hooks.command: root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { IFS= read -r f; { [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ]; } || exit 0; case "$f" in *.vue|*.js) "$root/node_modules/.bin/prettier" --write "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; "$root/node_modules/.bin/eslint" --fix "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1;; *.css|*.scss) "$root/node_modules/.bin/prettier" --write "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1;; esac; }
